india_trends.title: India's healthcare expansion faces a critical talent crunch, says Alisha Moopen
india_trends.summary: Aster DM Healthcare is gearing up for a significant upgrade, targeting a capacity of 15,000 beds by the fiscal year 2029. With plans driven by both natural growth and an ambitious merger, the company is optimistic about a surge in revenue and enhanced profit margins.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold gains $44/oz; silver up $3.5/oz on fresh Iran peace hopes
india_trends.summary: On 1 May, gold and silver prices improved as optimism grew for an Iran deal. Gold reached $4,673, and silver hit $77.52, recovering some losses. However, ongoing conflicts and rising energy costs continue to affect market stability and inflation concerns.

india_trends.title: Sell in May and go away? Not so fast, as earnings, geopolitics may offset seasonal concerns
india_trends.summary: Blindly following the old Wall Street adage "sell in ​May and go away" may prove costly, as investors weigh whether to call time on a powerful market recovery heading into a historically turbulent stretch of the year.

india_trends.title: Venezuela's oil exports jump to highest since 2018, with more sales to US, India
india_trends.summary: Venezuela’s oil exports rose 14% to 1.23 million barrels per day in April, the highest in over seven years, driven by increased sales to the US, India and Europe. The surge follows a US-Venezuela supply deal and eased sanctions, which helped boost output and clear inventories.

india_trends.title: Aster DM targets 15,000 beds by FY30 post merger with Quality Care
india_trends.summary: The company seeks to raise its margins from 21% currently to 200-300 basis points higher over the next three years.

india_trends.title: Emerging Assets Extend Gains as Iran Delivers New Proposal to US
india_trends.summary: Emerging-market benchmarks for stocks and currencies extended climb in holiday-thinned trade as Iran delivered a new proposal to the US via Pakistan while the Strait of Hormuz remains shut.

india_trends.title: Eating out, international travel costlier after commercial LPG, ATF price hike
india_trends.summary: International travel, too, might get more expensive, with prices of aviation turbine fuel (ATF) for international flights being raised, according to a statement by state-run refiner Indian Oil Corporation.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Roblox shares tumble as forecast cut signals safety measures weighing on user growth
india_trends.summary: Roblox shares on Friday plunged to their lowest levels ​in 18 months after the company ​cut its annual bookings forecast, raising concerns that new safety ​measures could suppress user growth for several quarters.

india_trends.title: US stocks today: Reddit rallies as AI‑driven ad growth fuels strong revenue outlook
india_trends.summary: Reddit shares jumped ​over 12% on Friday after an ​upbeat quarterly revenue forecast underscored growing returns from the social ​media company's AI-driven advertising tools.

india_trends.title: Jindal Steel Q4 results: Co swings to profit of Rs 1,045 crore vs YoY loss on 23% revenue surge
india_trends.summary: Jindal Steel posted a Q4FY26 net profit of Rs 1,045 crore, reversing last year’s loss, driven by strong revenue growth, higher volumes, and improved operational performance. Sequential earnings surged sharply, with robust sales, production expansion, and margin recovery supporting overall financial

india_trends.summary: Cboe Global Markets' CEO Craig Donohue on Friday outlined plans to sharpen ​the exchange operator's focus on key businesses, ​including a 20% reduction in its global workforce.

india_trends.title: Job losses to worsen due to commercial LPG price hikes, Industry associations say
india_trends.summary: Hotels and restaurants are facing a severe blow due to a significant hike in commercial LPG cylinder prices. Industry associations are urging the government to intervene and roll back the price increase. This escalation in operating costs threatens further closures and job losses in the hospitality

india_trends.title: Global brokerages downgrade Indian stocks: Should retail investors look to raise foreign exposure?
india_trends.summary: For retail investors, who have remained bullish on the India story despite a dismal performance by the Indian stock market, the need is to eliminate home country bias and opt for global diversification.

india_trends.title: India in talks with Nepal for ethanol exports, exploring shipments to SAARC nations
india_trends.summary: India is discussing ethanol exports with Nepal and other SAARC countries. This initiative aims to support farmers and strengthen the rural economy. Higher ethanol blending levels could lead to significant foreign exchange savings. The government is also engaging with auto manufacturers for flex-fuel

india_trends.title: Andhra Pradesh govt notifies five model e-mobility cities under EV policy 4.0
india_trends.summary: Andhra Pradesh has launched its Sustainable Electric Mobility Policy 4.0. Five cities, Visakhapatnam, Rajahmundry, Vijayawada, Nellore, and Tirupati, are now model e-mobility hubs. The state aims to boost electric vehicle adoption with new charging infrastructure and green corridors. This initiative

india_trends.title: Small-cap stocks shine bright in April recovery rally, beat large and mid-caps — Check top winners
india_trends.summary: Small-cap stocks excelled in April, led by the Nifty Smallcap 250's 17.10% gain. Driven by domestic investor interest, the segment recovered from previous declines, achieving its highest level since January and marking its best monthly return in nearly nine years.

india_trends.title: Wall Street surges as oil prices hold steady
india_trends.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.36%, the S&amp;P 500 rose 0.35%, the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.34%

india_trends.title: US stocks today: US markets open higher after best month in years
india_trends.summary: Wall Street's major indexes opened higher on Friday, extending their strongest monthly gains in years. Investor confidence in robust earnings reports outweighed concerns about oil price volatility. The Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all saw increases at the opening bell.

india_trends.title: Mangalam Worldwide Q4 net profit grows to Rs 15 crore
india_trends.summary: Mangalam Worldwide, a stainless-steel manufacturer, reported an impressive 81% surge in consolidated net profit to Rs 15.37 crore for the quarter ending March 31, driven by a significant reduction in expenses.
